title: Blue Canyon Vector Double Tap Shower Spray| Bathroom Accessory| Premium Shower Attachment for Bath taps| Push-on-Fitting| Suitable for Round & Oval Taps| Shower Head for Bathroom| ~1.5 Meters| (White)
features: ☑️【 CONVENIENT TO USE 】: Blue Canyon offers a range of simple-to-use and practical double-tap shower attachment that provides you with the desired comfort of a shower without the expense of changing the taps! The shower hoses can fit on single and double taps with round or oval openings.

☑️【 MULTIPURPOSE 】: Blue Canyon Shower heads can be used as a hair wash or shower head for taps in the bathroom or kitchen: our Shower head and hose Work with single and double taps for indoor and outdoor use. Shower Sprays can also be used for pet showers.

☑️【EASY INSTALLATION 】: Blue Canyon bath tap shower attachment (approx. 1.2m) is compatible with round and oval taps. The push-on fit is suitable for taps up to 2 cm, with stainless steel clamp for increased hold.
☑️【 PREMIUM MATERIAL 】: The shower hose for bath taps by Blue canyon is made with rubber end connectors with a soft, durable, flexible pipe, adding to its durability and making it more reliable.
☑️【 TRUSTED BRAND 】: Blue Canyon's ethos is to meet and exceed customer expectations with a customer-focused culture. We are constantly changing to meet and adapt to design trends.
description: Product Description Blue Canyon Vector Shower Spray The shower hoses can fit on single and double taps with round or oval openings. Perfect for bathrooms without an overhead shower. They can be used to wash hair over the bath or even the kitchen sink. The double tap connection is excellent for creating a mixer of the water for sinks with separate taps. Perfect solution for washing pets indoors or outdoors. All are easy to use, portable, and rubber-made.
